name: dev-team
description: Nayoo internal dev-team skill pack for Codex subagent orchestration, focused workflows, vendored specialist skills, and parallel work-item delegation.

interface.longDescription: Install the internal Dev Team skill pack: a lead AGENT workflow plus focused and vendored specialist skills for planning, implementation, debugging, verification, review, handoff, graphify, DocumentDB constraints, Nayoo service navigation, self-improvement, 9arm disciplines, Git/release workflow, Go, frontend/UI, security, testing, ops, and parallel work-item delegation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $dev-team to plan, delegate, and report a repo-split subagent workflow for this feature, bug, or worklist.
